name: JoAi: Deploy Contract

description.en: Record a deployment for a smart contract version to a specific network.
description.de: Erfasse ein Deployment für eine Smart-Contract-Version auf einem bestimmten Netzwerk.

bot: Use this when the user wants to deploy or record a deployment of a contract. Ask for the contract ID, version, and network (devnet or mainnet).

inputs.name: Contract ID

description.en: The ID of the contract to deploy
description.de: Die ID des zu deployenden Contracts

inputs.bot: The contract hash ID. If the user refers to a contract by name, list contracts first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Version
inputs.bot: The version identifier for this deployment (e.g., '1.0.0', 'v2').

inputs.name: Network

description.de: Das Netzwerk, auf das deployed werden soll

inputs.bot: The target network. Use 'devnet' for testing or 'mainnet' for production.
